title: Dog Bowl Textured Stainless Steel Non Slip Silicone Base Feeding and Water Bowl (Medium 15.5cm 900ml)
features: Elevate your pet's dining experience with our premium stainless steel pet bowl, designed with both functionality and style in mind.
Crafted from high-quality stainless steel, this bowl promises exceptional durability and longevity, making it a reliable choice for everyday use.
The innovative anti-slip base ensures that the bowl remains securely in place during mealtime, effectively minimizing spills and messes on your floors.
With a generous capacity and Diametre, it provides ample space for your pet's meals and water, catering to their needs with ease.

The textured finish not only adds a touch of elegance but also facilitates effortless cleaning and maintenance, allowing you to spend more quality time with your furry friend and less time worrying about clean up.
Upgrade your pet's feeding area with this practical and stylish bowl that combines durability, functionality, and ease of use.
